title: NASA Climate Change Science
description: A source card for NASA's climate-change science page and data-rich Earth observations.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA studies climate change from space by collecting long-term observations of Earth. Satellites help scientists see patterns in temperature, ice, oceans, land cover, atmosphere, and life.
This source card is useful for older students who need evidence, not just definitions. The full NASA page links to causes, effects, indicators, climate data tools, images, and interactives.
Rights note: NASA content is generally not subject to U.S. copyright, but NASA names, logos, identifiers, and some third-party material have restrictions. Always keep NASA attribution.
